title: Garbharakshambigai temple
tagline: Garbharakshambigai temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Garbharakshambigai Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in Thirukarukavoor, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Garbharakshambigai Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in Thirukarukavoor, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is located 7 km (4.3 mi) south of Papanasam, 20 km (12 mi) south west of Kumbakonam, 10 km (6.2 mi) north of Saliyamangalam, 20 km (12 mi) north east of Thanjavur and on the southern bank of Vettar River. Nearest railway station is Papanasam Railway Station, which is 6.7 km from the temple. Temple is also located very close (3 km) to National Highways 36 connecting Thanjavur and Kumbakonam, making it easily accessible by road also.

topPlaces.description: Melattur is a panchayat town in Thanjavur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located 18 kilometres from the town of Thanjavur.

topPlaces.name: Oothukadu
topPlaces.description: Oothukkadu is a small village in the Valangaiman taaluk of the Thiruvarur district of the state of Tamil Nadu in southeastern India. This place is Famous for The Kalinga narthana krishna Temple and the great singer Oothukkadu Venkata Kavi.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Garbharakshambigai temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Garbharakshambigai temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Garbharakshambigai temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (63 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (65 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Garbharakshambigai temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Garbharakshambigai temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Garbharakshambigai temple?
faq.a: Stays in Garbharakshambigai temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Garbharakshambigai temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ombathuveli, Melattur, Tamil Nadu, Oothukadu, Perungarai, Agaramangudi.
